mapper.sql: select e.id, e.conversation_id, e.message_id, e.student_id, e.teacher_id, e.question_summary, e.status, e.priority, e.trigger_type, e.teacher_reply, e.resolved_at, e.knowledge_entry_id, e.remark, e.created_at, e.updated_at, e.is_deleted, su.real_name as student_real_name, su.class_name as student_class_name, tu.real_name as teacher_real_name from yx_escalation e left join yx_user su on e.student_id = su.id and su.is_deleted = false left join yx_user tu on e.teacher_id = tu.id and tu.is_deleted = false
mapper.select: where e.status = 0 and e.is_deleted = false order by e.priority desc, e.created_at asc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
select count(1) from yx_escalation e where e.status = 0 and e.is_deleted = false
mapper.insert: insert into yx_escalation (conversation_id, message_id, student_id, teacher_id, question_summary, status, priority, trigger_type, remark, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted) values (#{conversationId}, #{messageId}, #{studentId}, #{teacherId}, #{questionSummary}, 0, #{priority}, #{triggerType}, #{remark}, now(), now(), false)
mapper.update: update yx_escalation set status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = false
update yx_escalation set teacher_id = #{teacherId}, status = 1, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = false
update yx_escalation set teacher_reply = #{teacherReply}, status = 2, resolved_at = now(), updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = false
